description: BV Skill Multiplier Table - multiply base BV by the multiplier for given Gunnery/Piloting skills. Base BV assumes Gunnery 4 / Piloting 5.
note: Lower skill numbers are better (0 is best, 8 is worst)
usage: multipliers[gunnerySkill][pilotingSkill] - e.g., multipliers['4']['5'] = 0.88 for standard 4/5 pilot
